subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1912-07-12
subcodes.first_line: This city with its suburbs has about half the population of Persia. If Persia had a population and an affluence like this, and had she turned herself to progress
subcodes.first_line_orig: این شهر و اطرافش نصف ایران جمعیت دارد اگر ایران چنین جمعیت و ثروتی میداشت و رو بترقی میگذاشت
